title: Peppery Crunchy Saudia Pepper Crumble
description: A meal-prep saudi arabian dish featuring Italian seasoning, spices for a peppery crunch and a light, crumbly texture. This dish is gluten-free and low FODMAP-friendly.

ingredients.name: Saudia Pepper
ingredients.notes: Available in Middle East markets or substitute with cayenne pepper.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add saudi pepper and Italian seasoning blend to the hot oil.
Stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant, then add sliced almonds.
Cook until the nuts are golden brown and crispy, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
Remove from heat immediately after the last batch of nuts has turned golden and sprinkle evenly over a serving dish or wrap in parchment paper for easy storage.
